Home.showcaseDescription: The home route previews a few selected cards first, while the full collection can live on the work archive page.

Guest.description: Guestbook input will move into a modal feature later. For now, this page focuses on the public intro and reading experience.
Guest.item1: Public message area optimized for reading
Guest.item2: Writing will move into a later create-guestbook-entry feature
Guest.item3: The page only handles composition and data fetching
Guest.title: Guest interactions stay lightweight and modal-driven.

Blog.description: For now, the page keeps the list and base metadata structure only. Search, tag filters and comments will ship as separate features later.
Blog.title: Technical writing, tags, search and comments come later.

Work.showcaseDescription: Unlike the compact preview on the home route, this page shows the full collection of project cards.

Contact.description: This closing area reserves space for a short motion cue and a direct contact prompt.
Contact.title: A compact closing section with motion.

motion-library.headline: Motion-first component library
motion-library.summary: A project that organized motion tokens and UI rules so brand interactions can be reused at the component level.

supabase-editorial.headline: Editorial platform with Supabase
supabase-editorial.summary: A project that mapped a Supabase-based writing and publishing flow and clarified SSR boundaries for the App Router.

guest-campaign.headline: Guest onboarding campaign site
guest-campaign.summary: A landing and conversion flow designed to move paid traffic smoothly into the product experience.

typography-rhythm.title: Typography rhythm across Korean and Japanese copy
typography-rhythm.description: Notes on how line-height and font choice affect layout density in multilingual interfaces.

svgr-turbopack.title: Running SVGR consistently in Webpack and Turbopack
svgr-turbopack.description: Configuration notes for keeping the same SVG import experience across development and production tooling.

supabase-ssr-boundary.title: Mapping Supabase SSR boundaries before feature work
supabase-ssr-boundary.description: A structure memo that defines how client, server and middleware responsibilities should be split first.
